novels.title: The Silent Patient
novels.author: Alex Michaelides
novels.description: Alicia Berenson refuses to speak after shooting her husband. Theo Faber becomes obsessed with uncovering her motive.

novels.title: Dune
novels.author: Frank Herbert
novels.description: Paul Atreides and his family are drawn into a deadly political struggle on the desert planet Arrakis.

novels.title: Project Hail Mary
novels.author: Andy Weir
novels.description: Ryland Grace is the sole survivor on a desperate mission to save Earth from catastrophe.

novels.title: The Midnight Library
novels.author: Matt Haig
novels.description: Between life and death there is a library, and within that library, the shelves go on forever.

novels.title: Atomic Habits
novels.author: James Clear
novels.description: An easy & proven way to build good habits & break bad ones.
